languages.text: {n}Взгляд Вольного Торговца замирает чуть выше вашего плеча. Когда он обращается к вам, голос из вокс-решетки скрипит сильнее, чем прежде, не в силах передать направленное на вас возмущение.{/n} "Вы привели ксеноса в мой дворец?! Позвольте напомнить: то, что дозволено Вольному Торговцу, не дозволено его вассалам".

{n}The Rogue Trader's gaze stops just above your shoulder. When he addresses you, the voice from the vox-grille screeches more violently than before, unable to convey the outrage directed at you.{/n} "You brought a xenos to my palace! Let me remind you: what is permitted for a Rogue Trader is not for his vassals."
languages.original_text: {n}Взгляд Вольного Торговца замирает чуть выше вашего плеча. Позвольте напомнить: то, что дозволено Вольному Торговцу, не дозволено его вассалам".

Let me remind you: what is permitted for a Rogue Trader is not for his vassals."

languages.text: {n}行商浪人的目光停在了你肩膀上方。当他向你发话时，音阵格栅传出的声音愈发尖利，却无法传达那冲你而来的狂怒。{/n}“你居然把异形带进我的宫殿！让我提醒你一下，行商浪人能做的事，不代表他的封臣也可以做。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's gaze stops just above your shoulder. When he addresses you, the voice from the vox-grille screeches more violently than before, unable to convey the outrage directed at you.{/n} "You brought a xenos to my palace! Let me remind you: what is permitted for a Rogue Trader is not for his vassals."

traits.locale_text: {n}行商浪人的目光停在了你肩膀上方。当他向你发话时，音阵格栅传出的声音愈发尖利，却无法传达那冲你而来的狂怒。{/n}“你居然把异形带进我的宫殿！让我提醒你一下，行商浪人能做的事，不代表他的封臣也可以做。”

languages.text: {n}Le regard du libre-marchand s'arrête juste au-dessus de votre épaule. Quand il s'adresse à vous, la voix qui s'élève de la grille-vox grince plus violemment qu'auparavant, incapable qu'elle est de traduire la gravité de l'outrage qui vous est reproché.{/n} « Vous avez amené une créature xénos dans mon palais ! Pour rappel, les privilèges dont jouit un libre-marchand ne s'étendent pas jusqu'à ses vassaux. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's gaze stops just above your shoulder. When he addresses you, the voice from the vox-grille screeches more violently than before, unable to convey the outrage directed at you.{/n} "You brought a xenos to my palace! Let me remind you: what is permitted for a Rogue Trader is not for his vassals."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard du libre-marchand s'arrête juste au-dessus de votre épaule. Quand il s'adresse à vous, la voix qui s'élève de la grille-vox grince plus violemment qu'auparavant, incapable qu'elle est de traduire la gravité de l'outrage qui vous est reproché.{/n} « Vous avez amené une créature xénos dans mon palais ! Pour rappel, les privilèges dont jouit un libre-marchand ne s'étendent pas jusqu'à ses vassaux. »

languages.text: {n}Hür Tacir'in bakışları, omzunun hemen üzerinde sabit kalıyor. Sana hitap ettiğinde voks ızgarasından gelen ses, daha şiddetli bir şekilde gıcırdıyor ama maruz kaldığın öfkeyi aktaramıyor.{/n} "Sarayıma zeno getirdin! Müsaadenle hatırlatayım. Hür Tacir'e reva görülen şeyler, vasalları için geçerli değildir."
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's gaze stops just above your shoulder. When he addresses you, the voice from the vox-grille screeches more violently than before, unable to convey the outrage directed at you.{/n} "You brought a xenos to my palace! Let me remind you: what is permitted for a Rogue Trader is not for his vassals."

traits.locale_text: {n}Hür Tacir'in bakışları, omzunun hemen üzerinde sabit kalıyor. Sana hitap ettiğinde voks ızgarasından gelen ses, daha şiddetli bir şekilde gıcırdıyor ama maruz kaldığın öfkeyi aktaramıyor.{/n} "Sarayıma zeno getirdin! Müsaadenle hatırlatayım. Hür Tacir'e reva görülen şeyler, vasalları için geçerli değildir."

languages.text: {n}La mirada del Comerciante Independiente se detiene encima de tu hombro. Cuando se dirige a ti, la voz de la rejilla de voco chirría con más violencia que antes, incapaz de expresar el ultraje que siente.{/n} «¡Ha traído xenos a mi palacio! Permítame que le recuerde que los privilegios de un Comerciante Independiente no se extienden a sus vasallos».
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's gaze stops just above your shoulder. When he addresses you, the voice from the vox-grille screeches more violently than before, unable to convey the outrage directed at you.{/n} "You brought a xenos to my palace! Let me remind you: what is permitted for a Rogue Trader is not for his vassals."

traits.locale_text: {n}La mirada del Comerciante Independiente se detiene encima de tu hombro. Cuando se dirige a ti, la voz de la rejilla de voco chirría con más violencia que antes, incapaz de expresar el ultraje que siente.{/n} «¡Ha traído xenos a mi palacio! Permítame que le recuerde que los privilegios de un Comerciante Independiente no se extienden a sus vasallos».

languages.text: {n}Der Blick des Freihändlers verharrt über deiner Schulter. Als er dich anspricht, ist die aus seinem Vox-Gitter ertönende Stimme schriller als zuvor und spiegelt seinen kaum unterdrückten Zorn wider.{/n} "Ihr habt einen Xenos in meinen Palast gebracht! Vergesst nicht: Was einem Freihändler erlaubt ist, gilt nicht für seine Vasallen."
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's gaze stops just above your shoulder. When he addresses you, the voice from the vox-grille screeches more violently than before, unable to convey the outrage directed at you.{/n} "You brought a xenos to my palace! Let me remind you: what is permitted for a Rogue Trader is not for his vassals."

Als er dich anspricht, ist die aus seinem Vox-Gitter ertönende Stimme schriller als zuvor und spiegelt seinen kaum unterdrückten Zorn wider.{/n} "Ihr habt einen Xenos in meinen Palast gebracht! Vergesst nicht: Was einem Freihändler erlaubt ist, gilt nicht für seine Vasallen."

languages.text: {n}ローグトレーダーの視線はあなたの肩の少し上を止めた。彼があなたに話しかけると、ヴォックス・グリルの声は以前よりも激しく、あなたに向けられた怒りを伝えることができない。{/n}「異種族を私の宮殿に連れてきたではないか！思い出させておくが、ローグトレーダーに許されることは、彼の従者には許されない。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's gaze stops just above your shoulder. When he addresses you, the voice from the vox-grille screeches more violently than before, unable to convey the outrage directed at you.{/n} "You brought a xenos to my palace! Let me remind you: what is permitted for a Rogue Trader is not for his vassals."

traits.locale_text: {n}ローグトレーダーの視線はあなたの肩の少し上を止めた。彼があなたに話しかけると、ヴォックス・グリルの声は以前よりも激しく、あなたに向けられた怒りを伝えることができない。{/n}「異種族を私の宮殿に連れてきたではないか！思い出させておくが、ローグトレーダーに許されることは、彼の従者には許されない。」
